svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="端到端泳道图" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-924" dy="-310" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1800" pageHeight="1180" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=28;fontColor=#101828;fontStyle=1;" value="AdOps Copilot 投放归因排障端到端泳道图" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="900" x="40" y="24" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=14;fontColor=#475467;fontStyle=0;" value="在线链路：用户提问 → 总控确定性前置 → LLM 路由候选 → 规则复算 → 固定 workflow → 场景诊断 → 安全交付。离线链路：反馈、Badcase、Judge AI 和版本回流。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="34" width="1460" x="40" y="68" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u" parent="1" style="swimlane;html=1;startSize=34;horizontal=1;rounded=1;collapsible=0;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontStyle=1;fontSize=15;fontColor=#101828;container=1;recursiveResize=0" value="用户 / AM / AdOps" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="1720" x="40" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="u1" parent="u" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EFF8FF;strokeColor=#2E90FA;fontColor=#101828;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;spacing=8;shadow=1" value="提出问题

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #101828;
display: inline-block; font-size: 28px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#101828, #d4dae8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: AdOps Copilot 投放归因排障端到端泳道图

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 61px; margin-left: 2px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #475467;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#475467, #9ca7b7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 在线链路：用户提问 → 总控确定性前置 → LLM 路由候选 → 规则复算 → 固定 workflow → 场景诊断 → 安全交付。离线链路：反馈、Badcase、Judge AI 和版本回流。

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 113px; margin-left: 860px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#101828, #d4dae8); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
